67e338d863ef71fce09df77e.question: This region’s city of Birobidzhan [“bee-ROH-beed-jahn”] is the capital of the world’s only Jewish administrative division. Nerpa seals are endemic to a body of water in this region also home to the Buryat people. A peninsula in this region contains the Valley of Geysers and encloses the Sea of (*) Okhotsk [“oh-KOTSK”]. This region is crossed by a namesake railway whose eastern terminus is in Vladivostok. This region’s city of Irkutsk sits near the deepest lake in the world. Lake Baikal is in, for 10 points, what vast region of Russia east of the Ural Mountains?
67e338d863ef71fce09df77e.question_sanitized: This region's city of Birobidzhan ["bee-ROH-beed-jahn"] is the capital of the world's only Jewish administrative division. Nerpa seals are endemic to a body of water in this region also home to the Buryat people. A peninsula in this region contains the Valley of Geysers and encloses the Sea of (*) Okhotsk ["oh-KOTSK"]. This region is crossed by a namesake railway whose eastern terminus is in Vladivostok. This region's city of Irkutsk sits near the deepest lake in the world. Lake Baikal is in, for 10 points, what vast region of Russia east of the Ural Mountains?
67e338d863ef71fce09df77e.answer: Siberia [or Sibir'; accept the Jewish Autonomous Oblast or Yevreyskaya avtonomnaya oblast or JAO before “Jewish” is read; prompt on Russia or the Russian Far East or Asian Russia or equivalents until “Russia” is read; prompt on Kamchatka Peninsula during the third line]
67e338d863ef71fce09df77e.answer_sanitized: Siberia [or Sibir'; accept the Jewish Autonomous Oblast or Yevreyskaya avtonomnaya oblast or JAO before "Jewish" is read; prompt on Russia or the Russian Far East or Asian Russia or equivalents until "Russia" is read; prompt on Kamchatka Peninsula during the third line]

67e338d963ef71fce09df920.question: Description acceptable. A supporter of this cause built namesake multi-pin mercury fulminate bombs for an assassination attempt that led to the 1st Palmerston ministry’s end. The Plombières Agreement dictated that Napoleon III support this cause, but was broken following the Battle of Solferino. The Siege of Gaeta ended the (*) “Expedition of the Thousand” for this cause in which the Redshirts helped conquer the Kingdom of the Two Sicilies. This cause crowned Victor Emmanuel II as King of a new state. Giuseppe Garibaldi supported, for 10 points, what movement to consolidate states on the Boot into a country later led from Rome?
67e338d963ef71fce09df920.question_sanitized: Description acceptable. A supporter of this cause built namesake multi-pin mercury fulminate bombs for an assassination attempt that led to the 1st Palmerston ministry's end. The Plombieres Agreement dictated that Napoleon III support this cause, but was broken following the Battle of Solferino. The Siege of Gaeta ended the (*) "Expedition of the Thousand" for this cause in which the Redshirts helped conquer the Kingdom of the Two Sicilies. This cause crowned Victor Emmanuel II as King of a new state. Giuseppe Garibaldi supported, for 10 points, what movement to consolidate states on the Boot into a country later led from Rome?
67e338d963ef71fce09df920.answer: Risorgimento [or Italian unification or unification of Italy or Unità d’Italia or Resurgence; accept creation of a unified Italy or creation of the Kingdom of Italy or creation of il Regno d’Italia or equivalents; accept consolidation of Italian states or consolidation of states on the Italian peninsula or equivalents; prompt on creation of Italy or equivalents; prompt on Italian irredentism or Italian nationalism; anti-prompt on Italian independence or Second War of Italian Independence or Seconda guerra d'indipendenza italiana with “for what larger movement?”]
